zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Bracebridge於1234年出生在英國賀特福爾皮爾頓時，她的父親Ralph Bracebridge26歲，母親Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire24歲。她於從1252年到1255年與Thomas Clinton在英國斯塔福爾阿敏頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1276年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Bracebridge于1234年出生在英国賀特福爾皮爾頓时，她的父亲Ralph Bracebridge26岁，母亲Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire24岁。她于从1252年到1255年与Thomas Clinton在英国斯塔福爾阿敏頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1276年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bracebridge

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Bracebridge was born in 1234, in Pirton, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Ralph Bracebridge, was 26 and her mother, Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire, was 24. She married Thomas Clinton from 1252 to 1255, in Amington, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1276, in Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Bracebridge est née en 1234, à Pirton, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Bracebridge, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Clinton du 1252 au 1255, à Amington, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1276, à Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Bracebridge 1234 in Pirton, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Bracebridge 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire 24. Sie hat von 1252 bis 1255 in Amington, Staffordshire, England Thomas Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1276 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Bracebridgeが1234年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアピルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph Bracebridgeは26歳，母Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshireは24歳であった。から1252年まで1255年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアミントンでThomas Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1276年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル リバートイで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Bracebridge(이)가 1234년 영국 허트퍼드실르 피르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Bracebridge(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1252년 부터 1255년 까지 영국 스태퍼드실르 아밍턴에서 Thomas Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 카스틀 리버티에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Bracebridge nasceu em 1234, em Pirton, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Bracebridge, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Clinton de 1252 a 1255, em Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Bracebridge родилась в 1234 г. в местности пиртон, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Bracebridge было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Clinton с 1252 по 1255 в местности амингтон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1276 г. в местности кастл либирти, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.
